zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Rayne於1348年出生時，她的父親Robert Hopkin Rayne43歲，母親Gwladus Ferch Hopkin46歲。她於1364年與Jenkin Fleming在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Rayne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Raine  .

variants.name: Raine
meanings: English: from the medieval female personal name Rayne (from Old French reine ‘queen’, Latin regina).
English: from the Middle English personal name Ra(y)ne, Reyne, a pet form of Reynold and Rayner , or possibly Ranulf (see Randolph ).
French and possibly also English: nickname from Old French raine ‘frog’ (from Latin rana).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Rayne was born in 1348, her father, Robert Hopkin Rayne, was 43 and her mother, Gwladus Ferch Hopkin, was 46. She married Jenkin Fleming in 1364, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Rayne est née en 1348, son père, Robert Hopkin Rayne, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Gwladus Ferch Hopkin, avait 46 ans. Elle a épousé Jenkin Fleming en 1364, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Rayne 1348 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Hopkin Rayne 43 und ihre Mutter Gwladus Ferch Hopkin 46. Sie hat 1364 in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom Jenkin Fleming geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Rayneが1348年に生まれた時，父Robert Hopkin Rayneは43歳，母Gwladus Ferch Hopkinは46歳であった。1364年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンでJenkin Flemingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Rayne(이)가 1348년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Hopkin Rayne(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwladus Ferch Hopkin(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 1364년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 Jenkin Fleming(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Rayne родилась в 1348 г., её отцу по имени Robert Hopkin Rayne было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Gwladus Ferch Hopkin, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jenkin Fleming в 1364 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Rayne nació en 1348, su papá, Robert Hopkin Rayne, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Gwladus Ferch Hopkin, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Jenkin Fleming en 1364, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
